     The Numbers Business Report

Chaos (2003)

Theatrical Performance
Domestic Box Office $204,274Details
Further financial details...

Synopsis

Malika, a young prostitute, is brutally attacked in the street by some thugs. Paul and Hélène, a conventional couple safe and secure in their locked car, look on. Overcome by remorse, Hélène then searches for the young woman and finds her lying in a coma in hospital. Hélène decides to look after Malika, thereby abandoning her husband and son. But the pimps who attacked Malika have no intention of letting her off the hook and soon Hélène finds herself caught up in a situation beyond her control… She undertakes to reawaken Malika’s will to live and to free her from the grasp of her torturers.

Metrics

Opening Weekend:$20,570 (10.1% of total gross)
Legs:9.93 (domestic box office/biggest weekend)
Domestic Share:100.0% (domestic box office/worldwide)
Theater counts:3 opening theaters/5 max. theaters, 13.8 weeks average run per theater
Infl. Adj. Dom. BO $405,157

Movie Details

Domestic Releases: January 31st, 2003 (Wide) by New Yorker
MPA Rating: Not Rated
Running Time: 109 minutes
Cast, crew, or production detail: Foreign Language
Plot point: Discrimination, Prostitution
Source:Original Screenplay
Genre:Comedy
Production Method:Live Action
Creative Type:Contemporary Fiction
Production/Financing Companies: Pierce/Williams Entertainment
Production Countries: France
Languages: French

Synopsis

Malika, a young prostitute, is brutally attacked in the street by some thugs. Paul and Hélène, a conventional couple safe and secure in their locked car, look on. Overcome by remorse, Hélène then searches for the young woman and finds her lying in a coma in hospital. Hélène decides to look after Malika, thereby abandoning her husband and son. But the pimps who attacked Malika have no intention of letting her off the hook and soon Hélène finds herself caught up in a situation beyond her control… She undertakes to reawaken Malika’s will to live and to free her from the grasp of her torturers.
